titleStmt.title: SII 26.65: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 65. (A.R. No. 63 of 1909.) TIRUKKAḺUKKUṈṞAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the kitchen in the Bhaktavatsalēśvara temple, right of entrance.
The record gives the details of date viz., Vijaya, Aippaśi 26, which correspond to 1406 A.D., October 25 (Monday).

It records the royal gift of taxes like paṭṭainūlāyam, śekku-āyam, eruttuchchammādam, āṭṭaichchammādam, poychchammādam, etc., due to the Cheṭṭis, etc., of Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam and Dēvamaṇḍalam for the festival of procession held in the month of Tai in the temple of Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuḍaiyanāyanār. The executor of the gift was Nāgīśvaramuḍaiyāṉ Villavarāyaṉ, the agent of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍalīśvaran śrī viravijaiya pūpatirāyar Aruḷic ceyalpaṭikku yaraicar kāriyattukku kaṭava [śrī] nākiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ
villavarāyaṉ taṉmacātanam kuṭuttapaṭi vijayavaruṣam Aippaci mātam 2 10 6 tiyati Uṭaiyār tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuṭaiya ṉāyanār taittirunāḷ tiruveḻic
ci Upaiyattukku naṭakkumpaṭi tirukkaḻukkuṉṟattilum Irukkum ceṭṭiyaḷ kaikoḷar kavaṟaiyaḷ taccavaṭi
vāṇiyar cekkuvāṇiyar ceṉaikkaṭaiyar maṟṟum palakācāyavaṟkattukkum koḷḷum paṭṭaṭai nūl Āyam cekku Āyam Erut
tuccammātam Āṭṭaiccammātam poyccammātam maṟṟum Āyavakai Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa
caṟuvamāṉyam Ākiviṭṭa Aḷavukku Inta Upaiyattukku Ivvakaiyil Āyattil Ākiṟa mutal koyil paṇṭāratti
le paṟṟikkoṇṭu śandrātittavaraiyum cellumpaṭikku śilārekai paṇṇik kuṭuttom Iṉta tharmmattukku Ahitam paṇ
ṇinavar keṅkaikkaraiyil kārampacuvai koṉṟa pāvattai peṟuvāṉ §
Digital edition of SII 26.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
